news.headline: Private placement by Skyharbour to raise up to C$8.5 million through a brokered deal.
news.summary: In recent news, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has decreased to 4.3%, which is the lowest it has been in the past five years. The country's GDP has also seen a significant growth of 3.8%, showing positive signs of economic recovery. Additionally, the stock market has reached a record high, with the main index rising by 15% in the last quarter. These numbers reflect a promising outlook for the nation's economy, indicating potential for further growth and prosperity in the coming months.

news.headline: Architect Kazuyo Sejima joins US-Japan Foundation as Trustee, enhancing cross-cultural initiatives.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, prominent Japanese architect Kazuyo Sejima was appointed as a Trustee for the United States-Japan Foundation (USJF). This appointment underscores her increasing impact in fostering international cultural interactions and partnerships. Sejima's involvement is expected to bring innovative perspectives to the foundation's activities.

news.headline: American Homes 4 Rent prices $500M public offering of 5.250% Senior Notes due 2035.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, American Homes 4 Rent (NYSE: AMH) disclosed the pricing details of an offering by its operating partnership, American Homes 4 Rent, L.P. The offering consists of $500 million aggregate principal amount of 5.250% Senior Notes due in the future.

news.headline: Inari Medical gets reimbursement approval for ClotTriever® system in Japan and partners with Medikit Co., Ltd. to expand access.
news.summary: Approval has been granted for reimbursement, enabling broader availability of a secure and efficient thrombus removal procedure for individuals with deep vein thrombosis (DVT) in Japan. This will benefit a significant number of patients who struggle with DVT, a condition with potential life-threatening complications. The approval paves the way for improved treatment options and better healthcare outcomes for those affected by DVT in Japan.

news.headline: Financial services company Oportun (Nasdaq: OPRT) to present at Sidoti December Virtual Investor Conference on Dec. 2, 2024.
news.summary: A financial services company, Oportun (Nasdaq: OPRT), based in San Carlos, California, reported on December 2, 2024, that it is set to take part in the forthcoming Sidoti December Virtual Investor Conference.

news.headline: Oncocyte's dd-cfDNA assay detects kidney transplant rejection 11+ months early. Published in Nephrology Dialysis Transplantation.
news.summary: Oncocyte Corp., a diagnostics technology company traded on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol OCX, disclosed positive new findings pertaining to its primary test VitaGraft™ in a recent publication within the medical journal Nephrology Dialysis Transplantation. This announcement was made on Dec. 2, 2024, from Irvine, California.

news.headline: Aimfinity Investment Corp. extends deadline for initial business combination to Dec 28, 2024 with $60,000 payment.
news.summary: Wilmington, Delaware - Aimfinity Investment Corp. I (Nasdaq: AIMAU) disclosed plans to prolong the timeframe for finalizing its initial business merger from November 28, 2024, to December 28, 2024. To achieve this, I-Fa Chang, sponsor manager of the Company, contributed $60,000 (Monthly Extension Payment) to the Trust Account on November 27, 2024. Aimfinity is a special purpose acquisition company registered as a Cayman Islands exempted entity.

news.headline: Credo Technology Group (Nasdaq: CRDO) reports Q2 fiscal year 2025 financial results ended Nov 2, 2024.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in San Jose, California, Credo Technology Group Holding Ltd (Nasdaq: CRDO), a company specializing in secure, high-speed connectivity solutions to enhance energy efficiency in the data infrastructure market, announced its financial outcomes for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025, concluding on November 2, 2024.

news.headline: vTv Therapeutics to attend Evercore HealthCONx Conference in Coral Gables, Florida from December 3-5, 2024 (Nasdaq: VTVT)
news.summary: A clinical stage biopharmaceutical company, vTv Therapeutics Inc. (Nasdaq: VTVT), based in High Point, North Carolina, disclosed that its management will engage in a fireside chat and offer one-on-one meetings at the 7th Annual Evercore HealthCONx Conference in Coral Gables, Florida, from December 3 to 5, 2024. Specializing in novel small molecules, the company's primary focus is on diabetes treatments. This move showcases the company's commitment to engaging with potential investors and stakeholders in the healthcare sector.

news.headline: CleanSpark reports record FY 2024 results: Revenue up 125% year over year, hashrate exceeds 33.5 EH/s nearing 37 EH/s.
news.summary: CleanSpark, Inc. (Nasdaq: CLSK) announced impressive financial performance with a 125% year-over-year revenue growth. The current hashrate has exceeded 33.5 EH/s and is expected to reach 37 EH/s. This was disclosed in their recent report for the fiscal year ending on September 30, 2024.

news.headline: Calamos closed-end funds announce monthly distributions in Dec 2024 to shareholders with notification of sources.
news.summary: In the city of Chicago, Illinois, on December 2, 2024, Calamos Investments®* disclosed the monthly distributions and distribution sources for December 2024 to investors of its seven closed-end funds. These distributions are in accordance with the funds' distribution plans. The specific details of the fund distribution were not included.

news.headline: OrthoPediatrics Corp. sponsors IPOS as Emerald-Level Sponsor at 20th annual symposium, hosting educational & networking events.
news.summary: Continuing its corporate partnership with IPOS, the company has maintained its status as an Emerald-level sponsor. This partnership signifies a commitment to supporting IPOS initiatives and events at the highest level. The company's ongoing support is crucial in furthering IPOS's mission and reaching its goals.

news.headline: Colliers partners with leading architecture firm to expand national footprint and boost strategic planning capabilities.
news.summary: Increase in geographical coverage and advancement in architectural and strategic planning expertise are witnessed with the recent expansion. The venture showcases a significant growth in presence across the country and a substantial boost in skills related to architectural and strategic planning.

news.headline: US government imposes stricter regulations on semiconductor exports to China affecting Lam Research Corp. Business impact analyzed.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in Fremont, California, Lam Research Corp. (Nasdaq: LRCX) released a statement regarding the recent announcement by the U.S. government about additional restrictions on semiconductor technology exports to China. The impact of these measures on Lam's business is currently being evaluated, with key considerations being the potential changes in export numbers and revenue related to China. The company is closely monitoring the situation to assess any potential implications and will provide updates as more information becomes available.

news.headline: Parsons-led joint venture delivers $27 billion Riyadh Metro project on 27 November 2024 with Egis and SYSTRA as consultants.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Parsons Corporation (NYSE: PSN) revealed that the $27 billion Riyadh Metro was officially inaugurated on November 27, 2024. Parsons, in collaboration with Egis and SYSTRA under the Riyadh Metro Transit Consultants (RMTC) joint venture, served as consultants for two contracts of the project managed by the Royal Commission for Riyadh City (RCRC). The successful completion of these contracts marks a significant milestone in the project's development.

news.headline: TransMedics appoints Gerardo Hernandez as CFO and updates financial outlook for 2024. Nasdaq: TMDX.
news.summary: Today, in Andover, Massachusetts, TransMedics Group, Inc., a medical technology company listed on Nasdaq under the symbol TMDX, revealed the selection of Mr. Gerardo to a key position. The company specializes in revolutionizing organ transplant treatments for individuals suffering from end-stage lung, heart, and liver conditions.

news.headline: ZIM company to update withholding tax procedures for December 2024 regular and special cash dividends.
news.summary: Israel's ZIM Integrated Shipping Services Ltd. (NYSE: ZIM) based in Haifa, has announced updates regarding regular and special dividend distributions scheduled for December 2, 2024. The global container liner shipping company's shareholders can anticipate these distributions as part of company operations.

news.headline: Interparfums, Inc. to develop Off-White brand in fragrance and beauty; 72% owned subsidiary to begin commercial use in 2025.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Interparfums, Inc. revealed that its 72% owned French subsidiary, Interparfums SA, has successfully acquired all Off-White brand names and trademarks designated for Class 3 fragrance and cosmetic goods. This acquisition is subject to an ongoing license that will conclude on December 31, 2025, at which point Interparfums will commence utilizing the fragrance brands for commercial purposes. Both entities plan to foster a robust, enduring alliance aimed at collaborating on various strategies, launching products in different categories, and implementing market initiatives.

news.headline: Portillo's names Tony Darden as COO, with 30 years of experience. Company known for Chicago-style menu. (Character count: 97)
news.summary: A seasoned professional with 30 years of experience in the restaurant industry has joined Portillo's to aid in the company's expansion across the country. Portillo's, a renowned fast-casual restaurant famous for its Chicago-style dishes, disclosed the news on December 2, 2024. The business, listed on NASDAQ under the symbol PTLO, looks to capitalize on the expertise of the new addition to further its national growth strategy.

news.headline: Inari Medical partners with 6 Dimensions Capital and VFLO Medical to bring technology to Greater China.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Inari Medical, Inc. (NASDAQ: NARI) disclosed a new collaboration. The medical device company has partnered with 6 Dimensions Capital and its successor fund, 120 Capital, along with VFLO Medical. VFLO Medical is a medical device platform that originated from 6 Dimensions and 120 Capital. The aim of this joint venture is to extend access to Inari’s advanced technology to patients in Greater China facing substantial medical needs. This strategic move is intended to address the needs of patients suffering from venous and other diseases in the region, with the goal of improving their quality of life.

news.headline: Real estate giants Compass, Christie's International, @properties, and Ansley come together. Christie's has 100+ affiliates in 50 countries.
news.summary: With more than 100 affiliates in nearly 50 countries and territories globally, Christie's International Real Estate has established a strong partnership with the renowned Christie's Auction House. In the US, @properties ranks as the 8th largest residential brokerage based on sales volume. Additionally, they are known for providing top-notch title services.

news.headline: IAS to feature CEO Lisa Utzschneider & CFO Tania Secor at upcoming investor conferences. (Nasdaq: IAS)
news.summary: Integral Ad Science, a prominent global media measurement and optimization platform listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol IAS, revealed on December 2, 2024, that both Lisa Utzschneider, the CEO, and Tania Secor, the CFO, will engage in fireside discussions at various investor conferences. Lisa Utzschneider and Tania Secor are set to participate in discussions at significant events such as Raymond...

news.headline: Biomea Fusion, Inc. granted 30,000 stock options to one new employee under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
news.summary: Biomea Fusion, Inc., based in Redwood City, California, and listed as Nasdaq: BMEA, a biopharmaceutical company in the clinical stage, specializing in oral covalent small molecules for diabetes, obesity, and genetically defined cancers treatment, disclosed a recent development. On December 2, 2024, the compensation committee of Biomea's board of directors awarded a new employee with non-qualified stock options for the purchase of 30,000 shares of the company's common stock. The stock options will vest gradually over four years, with 1/16th vesting quarterly, contingent on the employee's continuous service with the company. This allocation was part of Biomea's 2023 Inducement Equity Plan.

news.headline: NKGen Biotech chosen as a preferred bidder for NKMax with $18 million funding for court-managed rehabilitation in South Korea.
news.summary: NKGen Biotech, Inc., a biotechnology company, has been chosen as the preferred stalking horse bidder for NKMax Co., Ltd. in South Korea's court-managed rehabilitation process. NKMax, holding a 25% equity interest in NKGen, filed for rehabilitation in April 2024. NKGen's proposal includes up to $18 million in funding from a third-party investor. The final decision on the acquisition is expected in February 2025, with NKGen and its partners likely holding a majority of NKMax's equity.

news.headline: SiTime to present at Raymond James TMT and Consumer Conf at Lotte Palace Hotel in NY on Dec. 10, 2024, with fireside chat at 10:00 a.m. EST.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California on December 2, 2024, SiTime Corporation (Nasdaq: SITM) revealed plans to participate in the Raymond James TMT and Consumer Conference at Lotte Palace Hotel in New York, NY. The company is set to conduct a fireside chat at 10:00 a.m. EST on December 10, 2024. Various meetings with investors are also scheduled throughout the day.

news.headline: Shimmick wins $45.4M contract for Murray Street Bridge project in Santa Cruz, focusing on seismic retrofitting, cyclist, and pedestrian accessibility.
news.summary: Shimmick Construction Company, Inc. (Nasdaq: SHIM) based in Irvine, California, disclosed today that it secured a significant contract valued at $45.4 million. The contract entails the extensive seismic retrofitting and enhancements for the Murray Street Bridge located at the Santa Cruz Small Craft Harbor. The project aims to bolster the bridge's seismic endurance and upgrade accessibility for cyclists and pedestrians.

news.headline: BILL Holdings, Inc. plans to offer $1.0 billion of convertible senior notes due 2030 to qualified institutional buyers.
news.summary: SAN JOSE, Calif.-- BILL Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BILL) revealed plans to issue $1.0 billion in convertible senior notes due 2030. The offering of the Notes is contingent upon market conditions and other variables. These notes will be offered and sold privately to individuals deemed to be qualified institutional buyers under Rule 144A of the Securities Act of 1933. Additionally, BILL intends to provide...

news.headline: indie Semiconductor to offer $175 million in Convertible Senior Notes due 2029 through private offering.
news.summary: Indie Semiconductor, Inc., an automotive solutions company, has proposed a private offering of $175 million in Convertible Senior Notes due 2029. The offering is subject to market conditions and will be available to qualified institutional buyers under Rule 144A of the Securities Act of 1933. The company aims to utilize the funds raised for various purposes, as per the announcement made today.

news.headline: Corpay (NYSE: CPAY) acquires GPS Capital Markets. Expects Corporate Payments to surpass $1.5 billion revenue by 2025.
news.summary: A global S&P 500 corporate payments company, Corpay, Inc. (NYSE: CPAY), has successfully acquired GPS Capital Markets, LLC, a provider of business-to-business cross-border solutions to upper middle market companies, mainly in the U.S. By adding GPS to their portfolio alongside Paymerang, Corpay anticipates that their Corporate Payments business will surpass $1.5 billion in revenue by 2025. The integration process is already in progress, marking a significant step for Corpay.

news.headline: Alarm.com (Nasdaq: ALRM) CFO to attend investor meetings at Raymond James & Barclays conferences in NYC & SF.
news.summary: Tysons, Virginia - Alarm.com Holdings, Inc. revealed that Steve Valenzuela, the Chief Financial Officer, is set to conduct exclusive investor meetings at forthcoming conferences. Specifically, he will host meetings at the Raymond James 2024 TMT & Consumer Conference in New York on Monday, December 9, 2024, and also at the Barclays 22nd Annual Global Technology Conference in San Francisco. Alarm.com Holdings, Inc. is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol ALRM and is a prominent platform for intelligently connected properties.

news.headline: IonQ launches new IonQ Quantum OS and IonQ Hybrid Services suite to advance quantum computing for enterprises.
news.summary: An announcement was made by IonQ today regarding the launch of their IonQ Quantum OS, along with IonQ Hybrid Services suite, offering new capabilities to enhance quantum computing for enterprise clients. The updated operating system is a significant improvement over the previous version, providing a boost in performance. IonQ, a prominent player in the quantum computing sector, is listed on NYSE under the symbol IONQ. This introduction is expected to revolutionize the industry, providing cutting-edge solutions for businesses utilizing quantum computing technology, showcasing their commitment to innovation and progress.

news.headline: Domo named leader in Nucleus Research 2024 Embedded Analytics Technology Value Matrix for 4th year. Usability, functionality, customer value assessed.
news.summary: In Silicon Slopes, Utah, Domo (Nasdaq: DOMO) has recently been recognized as a top player in Nucleus Research’s 2024 Embedded Analytics Technology Value Matrix for the fourth year running. This assessment evaluates vendors based on the usability and functionality of their solutions, along with the value customers gain from their capabilities. Domo Everywhere was the focus of the evaluation for this Value Matrix.

news.headline: Deutsche Bank to serve as depositary bank for NASDAQ-listed ADR program of Wing Yip Food Holdings Group Limited (NASDAQ: WYHG) - a meat processing company.
news.summary: Deutsche Bank has been chosen as the depositary bank for the American Depositary Receipt program of Wing Yip Food Holdings Group Limited, listed on NASDAQ under the symbol WYHG. Wing Yip Food Holdings Group Limited is a company specializing in meat product processing, dealing with cured meat products, snack products, and frozen meat products. The company's ordinary shares are also listed on the Korea Securities Dealers Automated Quotations of the Korea Ex.

news.headline: Warby Parker to participate in Morgan Stanley conference on December 3, 2024, at 11:45 a.m. Eastern Time. Livestream available.
news.summary: In New York, Warby Parker Inc., listed on NYSE as WRBY, a direct-to-consumer brand emphasizing vision accessibility, disclosed its participation in the Morgan Stanley Global Consumer & Retail Conference on December 3, 2024, at 11:45 a.m. EST. The event will be live-streamed at https://investors.warbyparker.com/. A 90-day online archive will also be accessible post-event.

news.headline: Addus HomeCare acquires Gentiva's personal care ops, serving 16,000/day across 7 states; funded by cash & recent offering.
news.summary: Addus HomeCare Corporation (Nasdaq: ADUS), a home care services provider, has successfully acquired the personal care operations of Gentiva. This acquisition covers a seven-state service region, including Arizona, Arkansas, California, Missouri, North Carolina, Tennessee, and Texas, catering to more than 16,000 consumers on a daily basis. The acquisition was financed by Addus through a mix of available cash and a portion of the proceeds from the company’s recent public offering.

news.headline: Dow Jones declines as Warren Buffett's stock is up 44%; Apple and Tesla make moves. Super Micro stock surges on probe outcome.
news.summary: Despite Apple's successful entry and Tesla's rise due to a self-driving announcement, the Dow Jones experienced a decline. Super Micro's stock surged following the release of probe results. Warren Buffett's stock saw an impressive increase of 44%. The stock market today showcased these fluctuations, with live coverage reporting on the events.

news.headline: Shannon Bona & Julius Swolsky of Graystone Capital Advisors achieve record-breaking 4.02% CAP rate on Arby's in Conroe, TX.
news.summary: Graystone Capital Advisors, a top investment sales brokerage, has recently finalized the sale of an Arby's location in Conroe, TX. Shannon Bona, First Vice President, and Julius Swolsky, Managing Director, accomplished a remarkable feat by securing a record-breaking CAP Rate of 4.02% during the closing process. Representing the Seller, a private investor and repeat client from the West Coast, the agents successfully closed the deal for the Conroe, TX Arby's.

news.headline: McGrath RentCorp to attend Wolfe Research Small and Mid-Cap Conference on Dec 5, 2024. CEO and CFO to participate. (Numbers: Nasdaq: MGRC, Dec 5, 2024)
news.summary: Based in Livermore, California, McGrath RentCorp (Nasdaq: MGRC), a top business-to-business rental company in North America, shared that its CEO, Joe Hanna, and CFO, Keith Pratt, will attend investor meetings at the Wolfe Research Small and Mid-Cap Conference on December 5, 2024. McGrath RentCorp (Nasdaq: MGRC) is recognized for its prominent role in the North American rental industry.

news.headline: Fluor's CFO Joe Brennan retires; John Regan appointed as new CFO. 0 characters.
news.summary: Irving, Texas-based company announces Chief Financial Officer Joe Brennan's retirement. John Regan is appointed as the new CFO. The change in leadership comes as part of Fluor's ongoing efforts to strengthen its financial team.

news.headline: USPS released 2024 Post-Election Report, processed 99M+ ballots successfully, delivering them within one day on average.
news.summary: The 2024 General Election saw a record-breaking processing of over 99 million ballots. On average, ballots were swiftly delivered from voters to election officials within a single day. The United States Postal Service disclosed these findings in its 2024 Post-Election Analysis Report, marking a significant achievement in election efficiency.

news.headline: Sportradar's CFO to attend Morgan Stanley conference on Dec 4, 2024 at 2:15pm EST, accessible at investors.sportradar.com.
news.summary: In St. Gallen, Switzerland, on Dec. 02, 2024, Sportradar Group AG (NASDAQ: SRAD) revealed that Craig Felenstein, the Chief Financial Officer, is set to join the Morgan Stanley Consumer & Retail Conference on Dec. 4, 2024. The conference talk is scheduled for 2:15 pm Eastern Time, and interested parties can view the webcast at investors.sportradar.com. Sportradar, a prominent global sports technology firm, is dedicated to enhancing sports fan and bettor experiences.

news.headline: Royce Micro-Cap Trust, Inc. (NYSE-RMT) declares Q4 distribution of $0.21 per share on Common Stock.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Royce Micro-Cap Trust, Inc. announced a fourth quarter dividend of $0.21 per share for its Common Stock trading on NYSE-RMT. Shareholders have the option to receive this distribution in additional Common Stock shares or cash.

news.headline: Royce Global Trust, Inc. declares $0.47 per share year-end Common Stock distribution for NYSE-RGT.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Royce Global Trust, Inc. (NYSE-RGT) announced a year-end distribution of $0.47 per share on its Common Stock. This distribution can be paid out in additional shares of Common Stock or in cash based on stockholder preference.

news.headline: Fox Corp CFO Steve Tomsic to join UBS Global Media and Communications Conference on Dec 9 at 12pm (Eastern). #FOX #UBS
news.summary: In a news release dated December 2, 2024, Fox Corporation revealed that their Chief Financial Officer, Steve Tomsic, is set to take part in the upcoming UBS Global Media and Communications Conference on December 9. The session is scheduled to commence at 12:00pm Eastern time and 9:00am Pacific time. Fox Corporation is listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange under the ticker symbols FOXA and FOX.

news.headline: Summit Midstream Corp (NYSE: SMC) completes acquisition of Tall Oak Midstream III after shareholder approval.
news.summary: Houston-based Summit Midstream Corporation, listed on NYSE as SMC, disclosed on Dec. 2, 2024, that both the company and its wholly owned subsidiary, Summit Midstream Partners, LP, obtained shareholder approval and finalized a prior transaction.

news.headline: Amgen to present at Citi's 2024 Global Healthcare Conference on Dec. 5, 2024 at 9:30 a.m. ET. Executives to discuss.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Amgen (NASDAQ: AMGN) announced their participation in Citi's 2024 Global Healthcare Conference on December 5, 2024, at 9:30 a.m. ET. Peter Griffith, the executive vice president and chief financial officer, along with Jay Bradner, the executive vice president, will represent Amgen at the event.

news.headline: Rocky Mountain Chocolate Factory appoints Melvin Keating and Al Harper to its Board, replacing Starlette B. Johnson and Charlson Arnold.
news.summary: Rocky Mountain Chocolate Factory Inc. appointed Melvin Keating and Al Harper to its Board of Directors, replacing Starlette B. Johnson and Charlson Arnold, effective November 26, 2024. The company, known as RMCF and listed as Nasdaq: RMCF, operates as an international franchisor and producer of premium chocolates and confectionery items like gourmet caramel apples. The announcement was made on December 2, 2024, from Durango, Colorado.

news.headline: Thornburg Income Builder Opportunities Trust (NASDAQ: TBLD) announces $0.10417 per share monthly distribution on Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: Today, Thornburg Income Builder Opportunities Trust (NASDAQ: TBLD) declared a monthly distribution of $0.10417 per share on its common shares. This payment is set to be made on December 20, 2024 to common shareholders who are recorded as of December XX.

news.headline: Oracle to report Q2 FY2025 earnings on Dec 9, 2024, after market close. Announcement made from Austin, Texas.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Oracle Corporation from Austin, Texas, stated that the earnings results for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025 will be disclosed on December 9, 2024, after the market closes. The announcement indicated that the information would be made public after the end of trading on Monday, December 9th.

news.headline: Vaxart finished enrolling 400 participants in Phase 2b study, 200 on their oral pill COVID-19 vaccine and 200 on mRNA vaccine.
news.summary: South San Francisco, California - Vaxart, Inc. declared on December 2, 2024, that the enrollment process for the initial group of participants in a Phase 2b clinical trial has concluded. The trial is assessing Vaxart’s oral pill COVID-19 vaccine candidate in comparison to an approved mRNA vaccine. The sentinel cohort, consisting of 400 individuals, with 200 given Vaxart’s COVID-19 vaccine and 200 provided with the approved mRNA vaccine. The study aims to evaluate the effectiveness of the oral pill vaccine against the mRNA vaccine.
